title: Grilled Chicken Skewers with American BBQ Sauce
description: Juicy grilled chicken skewers smothered in a sweet and tangy American BBQ sauce, perfect for a summer evening.

ingredients.name: Vegetables of choice (bell peppers, onions, mushrooms, etc.)
Optional: garlic powder, paprika, or other seasonings of choice

instructions: Thread chicken and vegetables onto the golden skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the olive oil onto both sides of the chicken and vegetables.
Season with salt, pepper, and any desired additional seasonings.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
While the skewers are cooking, heat the American BBQ sauce in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Once the skewers are done, brush the American BBQ sauce onto both sides of the chicken and vegetables.
